## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
<!-- Tell us exactly how to trigger the bug. -->

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## ✅ Expected Behaviour
<!-- What should have happened? -->



## ❌ Actual Behaviour
<!-- What actually happened? Include error messages or screenshots. -->



## 🖥 Environment
- **OS:** (e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **Python version:** (run `python --version`)
- **Django version:** (run `python -m django --version`)
- **Browser (if UI bug):** (e.g., Chrome 120)
